ai.title: Maharashtra Charts Digital Future with New IT and AI Department
ai.description: The Maharashtra cabinet has approved the creation of a Department of Electronics, Information Technology, and Artificial Intelligence as part of its Viksit Bharat 2047 vision. ai.title: 'Usko Acche Se Pelunga': Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma Threatens Pawan Khera, War Of Words Escalates Amid Passport Row
ai.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma intensified his attack on Congress leader Pawan Khera, warning of legal action and using strong remarks. Sarma alleged Khera evaded police and fled to Hyderabad amid the passport row. He also dismissed allegations against him as a “fake AI campaign,” further escalating tensions between the BJP and Congress ahead of elections.
